title: どうして、こんなことに……

text_block_list.name: Madam
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! Someone, please, catch my dear Maria and
return her to me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaah! The dog is coming this way!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: All... right, I'm g-going to catch—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Now the leash is caught around my leg!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dog drags Meisho Doto around until evening,
leaving her completely exhausted.
